fun plan(repoRoot: String, prRef: String): Verdict {
    val contextReadme = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/README.md")
    val contextIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/index.md")
    val contextMaintenance = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val generatedRepoIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val engineeringPrinciples = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val currentBranch = gitRevParse("HEAD")
    val mergeBase = gitMergeBase("HEAD", "origin/main")
    val changedFiles = gitDiffNameOnly(mergeBase, currentBranch)
    val relevantContextPaths = selectRepoContextForChangedFiles(generatedRepoIndex, changedFiles)
    val relevantContext = readFiles(relevantContextPaths)
    val prDiff = gitDiff(mergeBase, currentBranch)
    val sourceSnippets = readChangedSourceFiles(changedFiles)
    val mentalModel = buildMentalModel(contextReadme, contextIndex, contextMaintenance, generatedRepoIndex, engineeringPrinciples, relevantContext)
    val complianceEvidence = compareDiffToMentalModel(mentalModel, prDiff, sourceSnippets)
    val hotPathAssessment = assessHotPathImpact(complianceEvidence, prDiff, sourceSnippets)
    val statefulAssessment = assessStatefulCorrectness(complianceEvidence, prDiff, sourceSnippets)
    val sharedStateAssessment = assessSharedStateSafety(complianceEvidence, prDiff, sourceSnippets)
    val verificationPlan = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/playbooks/upkeep/ai-self-verification.md")
    val verdict = buildMmComplianceVerdict(complianceEvidence, hotPathAssessment, statefulAssessment, sharedStateAssessment, verificationPlan)
    return verdict
}
